title: alchemilla vulgaris var. obtusa
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. obtusa, commonly known as the lady's mantle, is a plant species in the rosaceae family. The leaves of the lady's mantle have astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including menstrual cramps and diarrhea. The medicinal properties of Alchemilla vulgaris var. obtusa are often used to soothe and calm the digestive system, reducing inflammation and promoting healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be used to harness its health benefits, including reducing menstrual bleeding and improving digestive health.
